doc1.name: Dr. Kamal Adnani
doc1.desc: Our orthopedic traumatologist treats injuries, fractures and musculoskeletal disorders with expertise, precision and appropriate care to ensure a good recovery.

spec1.title: Orthopedics – Traumatology
spec1.detail: Management of fractures, trauma and diseases of bones and joints.

spec2.title: Orthopedic surgery
spec2.detail: Surgical treatment of bones, joints and ligaments with modern techniques.

doc2.name: Dr. Aziz Laarbi
doc2.desc: Our urologist manages all urinary and genital conditions with expertise, precision and human support at each stage.

spec1.title: Urological surgery
spec1.detail: urinary lithiasis, prostate surgery, bladder surgery

doc3.name: Dr. Az-Eddin El Bouhali
doc3.desc: Our anesthesiologist-intensivist ensures the safety and comfort of the patient before, during and after each surgical intervention.
